spl_product_data_elements: DRAVYNOR TOPICAL ANALGESIC HEAT Patch Menthol 24mg Capsaicin 16mg TOPICAL ANALGESIC HEAT Patch TARTARIC ACID TETRASODIUM EDTA SODIUM POLYACRYLATE (2500000 MW) TITANIUM DIOXIDE WATER MENTHOL MENTHOL CARBOXYMETHYLCELLULOSE SODIUM DIHYDROXYALUMINUM AMINOACETATE GLYCERIN CAPSAICIN CAPSAICIN
indications_and_usage: Use ■ temporarily relieves minor pain associated with: ■ arthritis ■ simple backache ■ bursitis ■ tendonitis ■ muscle strains ■ sprains ■ bruises ■ cramps
do_not_use: Do not use with a heating pad or any additional external heat source.
when_using: When Using ■ Use only as directed. Read and follow all directions and warnings on this carton. ■ Avoid contact with eyes and mucous membranes ■ Do not apply to wounds or damaged skin, broken or irritated skin ■ A transient burning sensation may occur upon application but usually disappears within a few days.
stop_use: Stop Use ■ condition worsens ■ redness is present ■ irritation develops ■ symptoms persist for more than 7 days or clear up and occur again within a few days
ask_doctor: Ask Doctor ■ condition worsens ■ redness is present ■ irritation develops ■ symptoms persist for more than 7 days or clear up and occur again within a few days
keep_out_of_reach_of_children: Keep Out Of Reach Of Children If swallowed, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away.
dosage_and_administration: Directions adults and children over 12 years. remove backing from patch by firmly grasping both ends and gently pulling until backing separates in middle carefully remove smaller portion of backing from patch and apply exposed portion of patch to affected area once exposed portion of patch is positioned, carefully remove remaining backing to completely apply patch to affected area Wear one patch for up to 8 hours. Repeat if needed, but do not use more than 3 times daily. children 12 years or younger: ask a doctor
inactive_ingredient: Inactive ingredients Glycerin,Sodium Polyacrylate, Sodium Carboxymethyl Cellulose, Dihydroxyaluminum Aminoacetate, Titanium Dioxide, Tetrasodium EDTA, Purified Water, Tartaric Acid

generic_name: MENTHOL 24MG CAPSAICIN 16MG TOPICAL ANALGESIC HEAT PATCH
